projects.title: Wheele
projects.subtitle: Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Car Rental Platform
projects.description: Designed and developed a full-stack collaborative economy platform connecting vehicle owners with renters, overseeing the entire lifecycle from database architecture to mobile UI implementation.

projects.title: FitReserva
projects.subtitle: SaaS Fitness Management & Booking Platform
projects.description: End-to-end development of a "ClassPass-style" SaaS platform connecting users with multiple fitness centers. The solution empowers gym owners to manage their business operations while providing users with a seamless real-time booking experience under hybrid subscription models.

experience.description: Accenture — Senior Software Engineer (Nov 2025 - Present). Designing and developing automation scripts and internal microservices to streamline CI/CD workflows, implementing blue‑green deployments and standardizing environment configurations for high‑availability AEM environments.

TransUnion — Senior Software Engineer (Sep 2024 - Nov 2025). Designed microservices architecture for high‑traffic applications, reduced vulnerabilities with a security‑first approach and Checkmarx integration, and built scalable cloud functions in GCP using Python and event‑driven components (Pub/Sub).

Accenture — Senior Software Engineer (Jun 2023 - Sep 2024). Led migration of monolithic applications to microservices with Spring Cloud, streamlined CI/CD with Jenkins and integrated AWS services to improve scalability and reduce infrastructure costs.

Accenture — Software Engineer (Aug 2021 - May 2023). Built OSGi service components for Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), delivered solutions aligned with coding standards and CI best practices, and designed GraphQL endpoints to provide flexible data retrieval.

Sysco — Software Engineer (Nov 2019 - Aug 2021). Built full‑stack web applications and RESTful APIs, optimized complex SQL queries and stored procedures in Oracle/PostgreSQL and integrated third‑party services into client solutions.
